About Organization

MP High Court is the highest court in the state of Madhya Pradesh, India.

It was established in 1956 and has its headquarters in Jabalpur.

About the Programme

The MP High Court Senior Computer Programmer Assistant Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for Indian citizens.

The programme aims to recruit 130 Senior Computer Programmer Assistants to work in the MP High Court.
